items.description: Fisher Asset Management's 13F portfolio grew from ~$231B to ~$252B in Q2 2025. Click here to read more about the trades and holdings in the portfolio.

items.title: Walmart's earnings report will test investor confidence in US market
items.description: NEW YORK (Reuters) -Investors expect Walmart's management to strike a cautious tone on customer demand as the U.S. labor market cools and inflation ticks up, though the company has outperformed its peers over the last year due to its reliance on grocery sales and wealthier customers shopping there more often.  Still, analysts say this environment is a sweet spot for Walmart, which reports second-quarter results on Thursday before markets open.  The world's largest retailer by sales has surpassed earnings estimates for 11 consecutive quarters, according to LSEG data, sending its valuation soaring even as other consumer staples companies have struggled this year.

items.title: National Advertising Division Finds Claims for Crest’s Deep Stain Remover Toothpaste Supported; Recommends One Claim Be Discontinued or Modified
items.description: In an inquiry brought by competitor GuruNanda, LLC, BBB National Programs’ National Advertising Division determined that The Procter & Gamble Company (P&G) provided a reasonable basis for the name and product performance claims for its Crest 3D White Brilliance Deep Stain Remover Toothpaste. However, the National Advertising Division (NAD) recommended P&G discontinue or modify its "extra strength fluoride" claim.New York, NY, Aug. 19, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- In an inquiry brought by competitor
